  "decision": "fail",

  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Air Admittance Valve (AAV) installed in a location where prohibited by code",
    "AAV cannot be used where a gravity or atmospheric vent path is required by IPC/UPC",
    "Reliance on AAV in a prohibited application creates a non-compliant venting condition",
    "Trap seal protection may be compromised without a code-approved venting method"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the AAV and install a code-compliant gravity vent routed to the atmosphere",
    "Verify vent termination height and clearance per IPC/UPC requirements",
    "Inspect trap and trap arm for proper sizing and slope after vent correction",
    "Schedule re-inspection of the venting system before close-out"
  ],
  "rationale": "An AAV installed where prohibited is a non-compliant venting installation. IPC and UPC restrict AAV use to specific applications and prohibit them where a conventional gravity vent to atmosphere is required. At rough-complete stage this must be corrected before close-out, as the venting system cannot function as code intends in its current configuration.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 917 - Air Admittance Valves",
    "UPC Section 912.0 - Air Admittance Valves",
    "IPC Section 904.1 - Vent Termination",
    "UPC Section 906.0 - Vent Termination"
  ]
}
